name: Kinn
text: They gave me a detailed total loss appraisal report, which was even higher than I expected. Fiona helped negotiate the amount with the insurance company and got me a satisfactory result. Great service, great price!

name: Julie Skits
text: DvHive was professional from start to finish. The insurance company was trying to lowball me when I KNEW MY VEHICLE WAS WORTH MORE. The only way that they would increase the payout was if i provided an appraisal. DvHive helped with just that, they were so attentive, especially Fiona who helped me throughout this 3 week back and forth! Thank you!

name: Leo Petrolo
text: After my car was repaired, the trade-in value dropped more than i expected. DVHIVE helped me deliver a professional and certified appraisal. The insurance company accepted it right away! I was so surprised because typically they tend to lowball.The process was organized, the report was easy to read, and I felt supported the entire time. If you need a diminished value appraisal, this is the way to go.

name: Antonio Kodheli
text: They gave me a diminished value report fast, so i knew what i could get back on the value my car had lost, and then they followed thorugh on every step of the process to get that value from the insurance company.
